summary: Behavior-identical helper extraction (riskColor/severityClass in ThreatIntel, confColor in Storefront, okColor in AdminPanels) verified. No regressions.
verified_flows: Threat Intel: scanned example.com. Risk score 5.7 rendered with color var(--amber) (riskColor >5). Findings show badges: 'medium'→warm, 'low'→cold (severityClass). Report card + level badge use amber. No console errors.

Intel Marketplace (nav-storefront): 60 IntelCards rendered, confidence values 100% colored rgb(255,207,77)=#ffcf4d (confColor >=80). 334 verification node chips present. Industry filter changes card count (60 -> 2 for 'auto'). No console errors.

Governance > Monitoring (gov-tab-monitoring -> gov-monitoring): all 9 telemetry cards rendered. DB Connected & Scheduler Running colored var(--accent) (okColor true). Failed logins 24h=0 and Locked identities=0 colored var(--accent). Tenants/Users/Leads counters use color:inherit (okColor undefined). No crash.

Regression: Overview loads (434 leads, top scored list). Outreach panel renders with sample-pack-card, template dropdown, PDF/CSV buttons. Pilot Leads tab renders. Zero JS console errors across all flows.
seed_data_creation: One example.com threat scan created (minimal, as instructed).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor of 4 nested ternaries validated end-to-end via style-attribute inspection: amber@5.7, warm/cold severity classes, #ffcf4d confidence at 100%, var(--accent) for okColor(true), 'inherit' for okColor(undefined). No behavior change vs iteration_16.
